meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS Success
content.seo_description: Overcome the lack of SaaS knowledge with our Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly checklist to build your first real-world app with Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready scaffolding that eliminates the 'blank page' paralysis. By combining this robust architectural foundation with Claude Code, you bypass complex boilerplate setup, allowing you to focus entirely on core business logic and feature development, ensuring your first SaaS project is deployment-ready.
content.intro:
You stare at the blinking cursor, paralyzed by the sheer mountain of architectural decisions required to launch a single SaaS application. The industry talks about 'shipping,' but nobody tells you how to bridge the gap between a blank IDE and a live, functional product. Your lack of SaaS experience isn't a failure; it’s just a missing blueprint.

This is where the Antigravity project template changes the game. It acts as your skeletal system, providing the auth, database schemas, and API routes before you write a single line of business logic. When paired with Claude Code, you aren't just coding—you are orchestrating a professional-grade development workflow that turns a student project into a portfolio-grade asset.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure and environment variables to ensure your project is modular and scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a clean SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity template, including standard auth and database configurations.

steps.title: Define Your Schema Logic
steps.description: Translate your app idea into a data model. Focus on the core entities that provide value to your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a SaaS app with User, Subscription, and Project entities, ensuring relational integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for saas entities'

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flow
steps.description: Secure your application by integrating standard identity providers. Never roll your own auth; use the template's built-in hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the authentication middleware to protect private routes and handle user session state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement auth middleware with existing template hooks'

steps.title: Build the Core User Feature
steps.description: Develop the primary value proposition of your SaaS. Keep the UI simple and focus on the data transformation logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API endpoint and a corresponding frontend component to handle the core user value logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create api route and react component for core feature'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Deployment
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-ready by running sanity checks and automating the deployment pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite for the core API endpoints and generate a deployment config for Vercel/Railway.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests and deployment configuration'

pro_tips: Always treat your environment variables like top-secret keys; never commit them to git.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into smaller, single-responsibility functions after initial generation.
Prioritize 'Time to First Commit' over 'Perfect Architecture'; you can always refactor later.
Leverage the Antigravity template's built-in logging to debug issues before they reach the browser console.
Always build for a single user persona first to keep your feature scope laser-focused.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on gathering user feedback from peers and iterating on a single high-impact feature based on their input.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about building a SaaS and start executing with the tools the pros use. Your portfolio is only as strong as your last project. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
